utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all 5 corresponding sections. Check specification details: Each of the first four items includes a plan/service name, descriptive details, and explicit costs (monthly for health/property/travel; one-time for additional services). Total_budget includes a monthly cost figure, a one-time cost figure, and a note. The format requirements are met: health_coverage = physical/mental with costs (details imply comprehensive plan and cost provided), property_coverage = home/contents with costs (details and cost provided), travel_coverage = travel insurance with costs (details and cost provided), additional_services = enhancement services with costs (details and cost provided), total_budget = monthly/annual cost breakdown (monthly provided and one-time; no annual, but monthly breakdown is present as allowed). All items appear fully specified per the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four items: PrimeCare Premium Plan (health), PrimeHome Premium Coverage (property), PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel), and Adventure Expedition Rider (an additional service). From the ground-truth ratings, the first three have exact matches with listed ratings: PrimeCare Premium Plan (primary_health.physical) rated 6, PrimeHome Premium Coverage (property_protection.home_content) rated 6, and PrimeTravel Premium Plan (mobility_coverage.travel_insurance) rated 6. The 'Adventure Expedition Rider' does not appear as a named item in the ground-truth list; the closest related concept is 'Adventure Travel Coverage' in travel_enhancement_services, but the names do not match exactly. Since instructions require mapping only items present in the final plan to exact names in the ground-truth ratings, we cannot assign a rating to 'Adventure Expedition Rider' without an exact match, so it is omitted from RATINGS.
